Patch Set 1:

Nice catch, i just grep a bit, there are still other places that having similar problems:

[root@vm1 lustre-release]# git grep "quota_slave.enable="
lustre/tests/ost-pools.sh:                              osd-*.$FSNAME-OST*.quota_slave.enable=ug
lustre/tests/ost-pools.sh:                              osd-*.$FSNAME-OST*.quota_slave.enable=none
lustre/tests/sanity-quota.sh:                   osd-*.$FSNAME-MDT*.quota_slave.enable=$qtype
lustre/tests/sanity-quota.sh:                   osd-*.$FSNAME-OST*.quota_slave.enable=$qtype
lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:                 osd-*.$FSNAME-MDT*.quota_slave.enable=$QUOTA_TYPE
lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:                 osd-*.$FSNAME-OST*.quota_slave.enable=$QUOTA_TYPE

Patch Set 1:

It probably makes sense to enable the "set_param -P" testing all the time. This was meant as a transition from conf_param, but it is probably safe to change permanently at this point.
Uploaded patch set 2.

Patch Set 2:

Looks good to me.

Patch Set 2:

> It probably makes sense to enable the "set_param -P" testing all the time.

I was thinking of changing the default value of it. But I guess there might be other similar problems of "set_param -P" in the test scripts? Will push a seperate patch to run some tests.

parents.subject: LU-13439 lmv: qos stay on current MDT if less full

commit.subject: LU-14674 test: wrong path of enabling quota types
commit.message:
LU-14674 test: wrong path of enabling quota types

The set param path of enabling/disabling quota types in test script
is wrong. This patch fixes the path.

Test-Parameters: envdefinitions="PERM_CMD=$LCTL set_param -P"
Signed-off-by: Li Xi <lixi@ddn.com>
Change-Id: Id35c67195eb85eec805216ed9234ca2b29d145aa
